# Fixture provenance — pptx/battle

11 hand-crafted PPTX fixtures generated by
`kaos-office/tests/generate_battle_test_pptx.py` (via the `python-pptx`
library) to exercise every code path in the PPTX reader: bullets, rich
text, charts, mixed content, tables, edge cases, images, metadata,
notes, spatial ordering, and a 50-slide stress case. Run

```bash
uv run python tests/generate_battle_test_pptx.py
```

from the package root to regenerate.

The shared docProps metadata (creator empty, lastModifiedBy `Steve
Canny`, created 2013-01-27) is python-pptx's hard-coded default
template metadata, **not** an external author. All slide content is
generated programmatically by the generator script.

| File | Source | License | Retrieved | SHA-256 | Notes |
|------|--------|---------|-----------|---------|-------|
| 50-slides.pptx | Hand-crafted via `tests/generate_battle_test_pptx.py` (python-pptx). 50-slide stress case. | Hand-crafted, 273V (Apache-2.0, this repo) | 2026-04-02 | 568e141a12609a5553129ecf259895a31415b6471d38749a806999e163cba500 | Performance budget fixture; reader must parse all 50 slides under the suite's wall-clock limit. |
| bullets.pptx | Hand-crafted via `tests/generate_battle_test_pptx.py`. Multi-level bullets (`a:buChar`) + ordered lists (`a:buAutoNum`). | Hand-crafted, 273V (Apache-2.0, this repo) | 2026-04-02 | 51bd7ed46dac2cb90f2c77276509a15ce68cc9b1b395f50946eae8dc68632ad8 | Pins bullet vs. ordered-list detection. |

Embedded picture shapes with width/height. | Hand-crafted, 273V (Apache-2.0, this repo) | 2026-04-02 | 599803cce329c2b87b06ea1f4678562e40ff3476fa7f570a00a35d2452a809e3 | Image-dimension round-trip (`tests/unit/test_image_dimensions.py`). |

## Regenerating

```bash
cd kaos-office
uv run python tests/generate_battle_test_pptx.py
sha256sum tests/fixtures/pptx/battle/*.pptx
# update SHA-256 column above + the matching `Retrieved` date
# (git log -1 --format=%cI -- tests/fixtures/pptx/battle/<file>)
```

No file in this directory is a customer / privileged / pseudonymized
document — every fixture is generated locally by the in-repo script.
